log.title: Week 30 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Ice Cream Summer: Patient trust gains +15% from events.

Blogger Visit: A food blogger films in the waiting lounge. Your chairs trend. Three new patients call before lunch.

Week 30 closes. Daphne Novak adds 8.9 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.7 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 27 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Staff Bake-Off: Nadia declares a staff bake-off. Nobody wins. Everyone eats. The couch suffers.

Daphne Novak: A button holds on by a single thread during rounds, then surrenders with a soft pop against her swelling middle. She pins it shut, laughs it off, and orders lunch anyway.

Week 27 closes. Daphne Novak adds 5.7 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.7 lb heavier.

log.title: Week 26 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Compliment at the Desk: A patient tells Elena she looks "healthy and happy." Elena repeats the line twice. She orders lunch with extra sides.

Week 26 closes. Daphne Novak adds 6.7 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.7 lb heavier.

Daphne Novak: Daphne Novak reaches Heavy Habit. Weight hangs on her long bones and shows in the way she lowers herself into seats and lifts herself back out of them. Her belly is round and warm beneath the scrub top. Her arms have filled in at the upper curve. She drapes into clinic chairs with the leisure of a body that has grown accustomed to taking its time, long legs folded and flesh settling where it finds room. The body changed. So did the appetite. Both follow her down the hall.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

Caterer Convention: A caterer convention books the block. Sample trays flood the break room. Nobody skips.

Week 20 closes. Daphne Novak adds 5.4 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.5 lb heavier.

Daphne Novak: Daphne Novak reaches Growing Appetite. Her limbs are still long, still the first thing a person notices about her. They carry more now, soft filling-out along the thigh and inner arm that registers in the way fabric drapes when she stands still. Her movement has grown more deliberate, slowed by a degree she can feel. A slender woman with new weight is still slender, briefly, and the clock on that reading has started. Something shifted. She has not named it yet.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 18 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Ice Cream Summer: Patient trust gains +15% from events.

Food Truck Friday: You invite a food truck for Friday lunch. The line wraps into the exam hall.

Week 18 closes. Daphne Novak adds 5.2 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.4 lb heavier.

Celeste Mori: Celeste Mori reaches First Bites. Her hips and thighs feel fuller in the jeans she wears most often and she keeps coming back to that sensation when she sits down in the waiting room. She tells herself it is the laundry, though she knows it is the second dinners she no longer skips. The fit at the seat is tighter than it was at the start of the year in a way she can no longer explain away. She has been eating more and paying more attention to the waistband because of it. She wears a white tank with thin straps with a white leggings with a rolling waistband. Tee hem rides up a finger width when she sits. Waistband leaves a pink line. Buttons stay closed. Thigh fabric pulls when she kneels. Something shifted. She has not named it yet.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

Week 14 closes. Daphne Novak adds 2.4 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.6 lb heavier.

Daphne Novak: Daphne Novak reaches First Bites. A softness has appeared at her hip and lower belly that her slim frame makes obvious even at modest levels. She presses at it in the break room bathroom, more curious than anything else. Her scrubs still hang freely from her shoulders, fabric moving with her long stride without impediment. The change is small, and on a slender body, small changes speak before they are ready. Something shifted. She has not named it yet.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.
